data: Learn how to present your career goals in an interview

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to present your career goals in an interview.

Sharing your goals clearly shows confidence and planning ability.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/7a7af85f-af77-45df-9113-fa6b9e38d8fd-Interview---Presenting-Career-Goals.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about your career goal and how you plan to achieve it, use this structure:

"My career goal is to [goal], and I plan to achieve it by [action]."

For example: "My career goal is to become a team leader, and I plan to achieve it by improving my management skills."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/7a7af85f-af77-45df-9113-fa6b9e38d8fd-Interview---Presenting-Career-Goals.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If the interviewer asks where you see yourself in five years, you can say:

"My career goal is to work in a multinational company, and I plan to achieve it by building my communication skills."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/7a7af85f-af77-45df-9113-fa6b9e38d8fd-Interview---Presenting-Career-Goals.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you answer clearly by stating your goal and your plan in one sentence.

It makes your answer sound confident and well-prepared.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/7a7af85f-af77-45df-9113-fa6b9e38d8fd-Interview---Presenting-Career-Goals.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice presenting your career goals!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to present a career goal in an interview

1.My career goal is to become a software engineer, and I plan to achieve it by completing relevant certifications.
2.I don't really have a career goal right now.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to mention a career goal with a clear plan

1.I want a better job someday but I have not thought about it.
2.My career goal is to start my own business, and I plan to achieve it by gaining industry experience first.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. The interviewer asks about your career goal in management. Share your goal and plan.'

'2. The interviewer asks where you see yourself in five years. Share your career goal and action plan.'

'3. The interviewer asks how you plan to grow in this industry. Share your goal and steps to achieve it.'

'4. The interviewer asks what motivates you to work in this field. Share your career goal and plan.'

'5. The interviewer asks about your long-term professional ambition. Share your goal and how you plan to achieve it.'"
